specs.title: Scenario: Page has correct title, heading and a link

steps.title: Then the title should be "Example Domain"
And the heading should read "Example Domain"
And the page should contain at least one link

specs.title: Scenario: Page has visible paragraph content

steps.title: Then at least one paragraph should be visible

specs.title: Scenario: Landing page has branding and "Get started" link

steps.title: And the "Get started" link should point to /docs/intro

specs.title: Scenario: "Get started" click navigates to intro docs

steps.title: Given I am on the Playwright homepage
Then the URL should contain "/intro" and h1 should be visible

specs.title: Scenario: Page loads quickly and has a single h1

steps.title: Given I navigate to https://example.com and measure load time
Then the page should have exactly one h1
And interactive elements should have ARIA roles

specs.title: playwright.dev homepage has title and links to intro page @smoke
example.com page loads and has content
